questions.question: Compare and contrast the differences between a virus and a worm. Provide an example of each.
questions.hint: Focus on key characteristics and provide specific examples.

questions.question: What is the purpose of the Defense-in-Depth (DiD) security model? Explain how it can be implemented in a network.
questions.hint: Focus on the concept of multiple layers of defense and provide an example implementation.

questions.question: Describe the process of encryption and decryption, including the types of algorithms used. Provide an example of a real-world application of encryption.
questions.hint: Focus on the technical details of encryption and decryption, and provide a concrete example.
